translation_text.sn1.75:1.1: “Why are so many people here afraid,
translation_text.sn1.75:1.2: when the path has been taught <j>with so many dimensions?
translation_text.sn1.75:1.3: I ask you, Gotama, whose wisdom is vast:
translation_text.sn1.75:1.4: Standing on what need one not fear the next world?”
translation_text.sn1.75:2.1: “When speech and mind are directed right,
translation_text.sn1.75:2.2: and you don’t do anything bad with the body
translation_text.sn1.75:2.3: while dwelling at home with plenty of food and drink.
translation_text.sn1.75:2.5: one who stands on these four principles,
translation_text.sn1.75:2.6: who stands on the teaching <j>need not fear the next world.”
